title: Neuroglancer: WebGL-based viewer for volumetric data
abstract: Neuroglancer is an open-source WebGL-based viewer for volumetric data designed for connectomics. It supports visualization of multi-scale image data, segmentation overlays, mesh rendering, and annotation, and is the de facto standard viewer used across MICrONS, FlyWire, and other major connectomics projects.
notes: Software tool rather than paper. Maitin-Shepard is sole creator. Used by virtually every connectomics project worldwide.
